theme: two robot arms picking parts off a moving belt
title: Belt Duet: Scheduling the Shared Zone
strategies: do-nothing / single-arm EDF baseline (matches the checker's own reference, ratio ~0.1)

myopic two-arm EDF: sort parts by deadline, assign each to whichever eligible arm is free soonest, patch mutex conflicts with a reactive delay-or-drop -- ignores that the zone is a single shared resource until it's too late

schedule-the-mutex: alternately pre-assign contested zone parts between the two arms in deadline order so each arm's flank work naturally vacates the zone for the other, then locally re-assign any part that would otherwise be dropped
exchange-argument repair pass on top of the alternation plan
